creator: bugzilla@soulrebel.in-berlin.de
text:
mkvtoolnix has a Qt4-Gui since a while. However the port only offers the (wx)Gtk-Version. If I am not mistaken the Qt4-Version is now the official default and also default on other platforms, so mkvtoolnix should change to Qt4 as default and/or offer proper "make config"-knobs for toolkit-selection.

Maybe one could also split the gui into different ports, e.g. multimedia/mmg-qt4 and multimedia/mmg-wxgtk, so that correct packages are created, and users of one toolkit don't pull in another toolkit during binary upgrade.

Thanks for your help!
